meta.text:
Rahul Sharma 

AI Engineer 

Email: rahul.sharma@email.com | Phone: +91-9876543210 | GitHub: github.com/rahulsharma | LinkedIn: 
linkedin.com/in/rahulsharma 

Professional Summary 
AI Engineer with 5+ years of experience in designing, developing, and deploying machine learning and deep 
learning solutions. Strong background in NLP, computer vision, and MLOps with hands-on experience in 
production-scale AI systems. 

Technical Skills 
• Programming: Python, C++, Java 
• Machine Learning: Scikit-learn, XGBoost, LightGBM 
• Deep Learning: TensorFlow, PyTorch, Keras 
• NLP: Transformers, BERT, GPT, spaCy, NLTK 
• Computer Vision: OpenCV, CNNs, YOLO 
• MLOps & Cloud: Docker, Kubernetes, MLflow, AWS, GCP 
• Databases: PostgreSQL, MongoDB 

Professional Experience 
Senior AI Engineer – ABC Technologies (2021 – Present) 

- Led the development of NLP-based resume parsing and recommendation systems. 
- Deployed ML models using Docker and Kubernetes, improving inference latency by 30%. 
- Collaborated with cross-functional teams to integrate AI solutions into production. 

Machine Learning Engineer – XYZ Solutions (2018 – 2021) 

- Built predictive models for customer churn and demand forecasting. 
- Implemented end-to-end ML pipelines including data preprocessing, training, and monitoring. 
- Improved model accuracy by 18% through feature engineering and hyperparameter tuning. 

Education 
Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science 
Indian Institute of Technology, Delhi (2014 – 2018) 

Key Projects 
• AI Resume Parser: Built an NLP-based system to extract structured data from CVs (PDF/DOC). 
• Chatbot using Transformers: Developed a domain-specific conversational AI using Hugging Face models. 
• 

Image Classification System: Designed a CNN-based pipeline for automated defect detection. 

Certifications 
• TensorFlow Developer Certificate 
• AWS Certified Machine Learning – Specialty 
• Deep Learning Specialization – Coursera
